lines.ja: this is how it ought to be?
Just another day, throw your cares away
lines.zh: 又是一天，将你的烦恼抛开，
和我手牵手一起欢笑吧！
1 2 3，你看见过的最好的东西是什么？

lines.ja: The world you know, always running to and fro
lines.zh: 你所知道的世界，总是奔忙不停，

lines.ja: But don't be scared, I'm not going anywhere!
lines.zh: 但是不要害怕，我哪里也不会去！

lines.ja: So just don't touch the dial and stay here a while with me!
lines.zh: 所以别换台，和我待一小段时间吧！
惊慌！在雪花屏中！癫狂失控

lines.ja: don't you find it all romantic, the way things used to be?
lines.zh: 在曾经的往事里，你不觉得这很浪漫吗？

lines.ja: To trip the light fantastic, repeat it after me!
lines.zh: 来轻快起舞，和我一起重复吧！

lines.ja: This is how it should be, in studio seats
lines.zh: 在演播室的座位上，这就是它应有的样子，

lines.ja: My ego wired in the CRT

lines.zh: 熟悉的画面，不断重复着，

lines.ja: This is how it should be!
A B C, it sounds so sweet
lines.zh: A B C，听着如此甜美！

lines.ja: When you sing along with me!

lines.zh: 把你的和声保持在音准里

lines.ja: 10 9 8, for the sake of the way it ought to be.
Just another day, throw your cares away
lines.zh: 又是一天，将你的烦恼抛开，
和我手牵手一起欢笑吧！

lines.ja: Just another day, Just another day of
Who cares what people say, we'll stay another day in revelry, reverie!
lines.zh: 谁在乎人们怎么讲，我们会再多留一天，沉浸在狂欢与幻想里！

lines.ja: 1 2 3, who's the brightest star you see?
lines.zh: 1 2 3，你看见过的最闪亮的星星⭐是谁？

lines.ja: The world you know never seems to take it slow
lines.zh: 你所熟知的世界，似乎从未放慢脚步，
确实是如此疲惫的节奏

lines.ja: So don't delay, I'll be here to save the day!
lines.zh: 所以不要再拖拉，让我来拯救大家吧！

lines.ja: Just please don't touch the dial
Just stay here a while with me

lines.zh: 惊慌！在雪花屏中！癫狂失控！

lines.ja: Don't you find it all romantic, the way things used to be?
lines.zh: 在曾经的往事里，你不觉得这很浪漫吗？

lines.ja: To trip the light fantastic, repeat is after me!
lines.zh: 来轻快起舞，和我一起重复吧！

lines.ja: This is how it should be, in studio seats
lines.zh: 在演播室的座位上，这就是它应有的样子，

lines.ja: My ego wired in the CRT

lines.zh: 熟悉的画面，不断重复着，

lines.ja: This is how it should be!
I hope you won't be long.
lines.zh: 我希望你不要离开得太久

lines.ja: After all, I want to be wanted.

lines.zh: 惊慌！在雪花屏中！癫狂失控！

lines.ja: Don't you find it all romantic, the way things used to be?
lines.zh: 在曾经的往事里，你不觉得这很浪漫吗？

lines.ja: To trip the light fantastic, repeat is after me!
lines.zh: 来轻快起舞，和我一起重复吧！

lines.ja: This is how it should be, in studio seats
lines.zh: 在演播室的座位上，这就是它应有的样子，

lines.ja: My ego wired in the CRT

lines.zh: 熟悉的画面，不断重复着，

lines.ja: This is how it should be!
This is how it should be, in studio seats
lines.zh: 在演播室的座位上，这就是它应有的样子，

lines.ja: My ego wired in the CRT

lines.zh: 熟悉的画面，不断重复着，

lines.ja: This is how it should be!
Repeating "This is how it should be!"
lines.zh: 重复：“ 这就是它应有的样子！”
